summary: Iteration 18: Complete E2E testing of College Rank List integration feature. All 16 backend tests pass, all frontend tests pass. The feature allows uploading college rank CSV files and classifies applicants by NIRF status.

backend: POST /api/upload/college-rank accepts CSV with Rank,College Name,Short Name,City,State columns
POST /api/upload/college-rank returns 400 when College Name column is missing
GET /api/applicants returns college_status field in each record
GET /api/applicants?collegeStatus=NIRF filters by NIRF status correctly
GET /api/applicants?collegeStatus=Non NIRF filters by Non NIRF status correctly
GET /api/attended returns college_status field in each record
GET /api/attended?collegeStatus=NIRF filters by NIRF status correctly
GET /api/attended?collegeStatus=Non NIRF filters by Non NIRF status correctly
GET /api/summary returns rows split by NIRF/Non-NIRF per job role (e.g. 'RoleName - NIRF', 'RoleName - Non NIRF')
GET /api/summary has expected columns (job_role, total_naukri, total_registered, etc.)
College rank classification logic works correctly (1-100=NIRF, 101-150=Non NIRF 101-150, etc.)
frontend: Dashboard shows 'Upload College Rank List' button (data-testid: upload-collegerank-btn)
Dashboard has college rank file input (data-testid: collegerank-file-input) accepting .csv,.xlsx,.xls
View Applicants page (/roles) has College Status column in table
View Applicants page has College Status dropdown filter (data-testid: college-status-filter)
College Status filter has all expected options: All, NIRF, Non NIRF 101-150, Non NIRF 151-200, Non NIRF 201-300, Non NIRF
View Attended page (/attended-roles) has College Status column in table
View Attended page has College Status dropdown filter with all expected options
Summary page (/summary) shows job roles split by NIRF/Non-NIRF (e.g. 'AI ML Engineer (Freshers) - NIRF')
All upload buttons present: upload-naukri-btn, upload-pipeline-btn, upload-scoresheet-btn, upload-collegerank-btn

seed_data_creation: Test college rank CSV files created during testing with colleges at ranks 1, 2, 50, 101, 155, 205 to verify NIRF classification logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: College Rank List integration fully tested and working. The feature includes: (1) POST /api/upload/college-rank endpoint for uploading college rank CSV files, (2) college_status field added to /api/applicants and /api/attended responses, (3) collegeStatus query parameter for filtering by NIRF status, (4) /api/summary now splits rows by NIRF/Non-NIRF per job role. Classification logic: rank 1-100=NIRF, 101-150=Non NIRF 101-150, 151-200=Non NIRF 151-200, 201-300=Non NIRF 201-300, no match=Non NIRF. College matching uses ug_university and pg_university fields from naukri_applies collection.
